rationale: This archetype is a live-action POV "rush home to play" hook explicitly tied to a Tetris/block-puzzle product — palette (purple/yellow), framing, and emotional payoff are puzzle-relaxation coded, not the bright blue water-slide racing energy aquapark.io needs. Mechanic fit is very weak: the hook never showcases sliding, bumping, or competitive racing, which is the entire reason users tap install on this game. Only the casual/young demographic loosely overlaps; if adapted, the team would need to fully reshoot with aquapark gameplay reveal — at which point it's a different creative, not this archetype. Recommend skip.
